items.title: Human organoids reveal how to reverse “irreversible” nerve damage
items.summary: Cambridge researchers created miniature brain-and-spinal-cord systems in the lab that can send signals and even trigger tiny muscle contractions. items.title: CBD may slow Alzheimer’s by calming the brain’s immune system
items.summary: CBD may be doing far more than just easing pain or anxiety — new research suggests it could help fight Alzheimer’s disease by calming the brain’s runaway immune response. items.title: 'I forgot what it feels like to be outside' – First rooftop intensive care ward opens
items.summary: The outdoor ward, at King's College Hospital in London, will monitor how much it boosts the recovery of seriously ill patients.

items.summary: MANEKENKA Cindy Crawford (60) otkrila je da se 10 godina bori s blefaroptozom.

items.title: Forget LASIK: Safer, cheaper vision correction without lasers or surgery
items.summary: Researchers are developing a futuristic alternative to LASIK that reshapes the eye without lasers or incisions. items.summary: TOPLI napitci nakon večere pomažu probavi.

items.title: Prostate cancer screening only for 'a few thousand' high risk men
items.summary: Only men with a dangerous genetic variant and a family history of cancer should be offered screening, say UK advisors.

items.summary: Everything you need to know about the decision on who should be screened for prostate cancer.

items.summary: JEDAN liječnik opće prakse tvrdi da bi najbolja vježba za mršavljenje mogla biti vrlo jednostavna i potpuno besplatna.

items.title: Researchers block key protein that helps Parkinson’s spread through the brain
items.summary: A newly identified protein called GPNMB may play a major role in helping Parkinson’s disease spread through the brain. Researchers discovered that immune cells release the protein in response to damaged neurons, creating a vicious cycle that speeds up brain cell degeneration. In early experiments, a

items.title: Treneri otkrili što se događa s tijelom ako svakodnevno radite plank
items.summary: SVAKODNEVNO izvođenje planka jača mišiće trupa, štiti kralježnicu i poboljšava držanje.

items.title: Scientists thought brain inflammation was driving long COVID but the scans told a different story
items.summary: A new brain imaging study has found no evidence of widespread brain inflammation in patients suffering from prolonged symptoms after COVID-19 infection. Instead, the most severe long COVID symptoms were associated with increased brain activity in regions involved in mood and emotion.

items.title: New depression treatment targets the immune system instead of the brain
items.summary: A surprising new approach to depression treatment is showing early promise — not by targeting brain chemicals, but by calming the immune system.
